headline: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day offers significant discounts on robot vacuums. Many tested models from top brands are on sale. Now is an ideal time to invest in a robot vacuum.

headline: Formula E's new season is starting to look more like F1
summary: Formula E's new season will feature a revamped race format. Three new international race locations are added for electric cars. The schedule includes iconic circuits like Austin, Brands Hatch, and Zandvoort.

headline: The Pixel 10A finally costs what it should
summary: The Pixel 10A was previously considered a letdown with minimal updates. It offered features like satellite messaging and Gorilla Glass. Prime Day deals now make its price more reasonable.

headline: Prime Day deals ease high laptop prices
summary: Laptop prices have surged due to component shortages. New and existing models are more expensive than previous generations. Prime Day offers crucial discounts to alleviate these costs.

headline: 35 Top Gaming Deals for Prime Day
summary: Prime Day 2026 features a robust selection of video game deals. Discounts available for PS5, Nintendo Switch, and Xbox owners. Deals experts have curated the best savings.

headline: Save $80+ on PlayStation Portal for Prime Day
summary: Get over $80 off a PlayStation Portal during Prime Day. Buying a used model is the smartest way to save. Don't miss this deal on Sony's remote player.

headline: Prime Day slashes prices on Apple AirPods, Watches, iPads
summary: Prime Day brings significant price drops on Apple products. Save big on the newest generation AirPods. Discounts also available for Apple Watch and iPad models.

headline: New Kindle Scribe Colorsoft on First-Ever Prime Day Sale
summary: The new Kindle Scribe Colorsoft is on sale for the first time. This premium Kindle device is now available at a discount. Prime Day offers a prime opportunity to buy.

headline: Europe's Innovative Ways to Cope with Extreme Heat
summary: Europe is experiencing searing temperatures. Citizens are implementing unique methods to stay cool. Strategies include designated cool-down spots and reflective chalk on windows.

headline: Starmer Begins 'Orderly' Transition Talks with Burnham
summary: Keir Starmer holds discussions with Andy Burnham. He aims for a smooth, orderly transition of power. The outgoing PM offers civil service access to Labour candidates.

headline: Former SNP Chief Peter Murrell Jailed for Embezzlement
summary: Peter Murrell, former SNP chief executive, received a five-year jail sentence. He admitted embezzling over £400,000. Funds were taken over a 12-year period.

headline: Strait of Hormuz Traffic Surges After US-Iran Deal
summary: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has significantly increased. This follows a new US-Iran deal aimed at ending war. 42 ships transited the waterway on Saturday alone.
